title: astragalus baraftabensis
intro: Astragalus baraftabensis, also known as Baraftab Astragalus, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Iran. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus baraftabensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
